summary: High‑energy early‑80s show captured on a full‑sound audience tape; Jerry’s solos and China Cat Sunflower → Rider shine.
review: Fans rave about the vibrant performance, especially Jerry Garcia’s transition solos and the crisp China Cat Sunflower into Rider sequence. The recording, taken with quality Sennheiser mics, delivers a fuller‑than‑usual sound that lets the show’s classic early‑80s vibe shine through.

ai_rating.rationale: All five reviews are favorable (average 4.2 stars) and consistently praise both the musical performance and the recording’s fullness, giving a clear picture of a strong show with good audio quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Multiple reviewers note the “fuller sound” and high‑quality Sennheiser mics, indicating an audience capture that is clear and well‑balanced.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Described as a solid, standard early‑80s set that captures the band at its peak; reviewers call it “real good” and an end‑of‑an‑era classic.

band_member_comments.Jerry: His transition solos are highlighted as a major highlight of the performance.
band_member_comments.Keys: Reference to Keith Godchaux (still in the band) evokes the classic early‑80s keyboard feel.
